description: Original fictional American-football broadcaster for a stylized low-poly video game. Energetic but controlled, clear modern broadcast delivery, warm and authoritative. Capable of excitement without shouting every line. Do not imitate any named person, real broadcaster, celebrity, or recognizable catchphrase.
previewText: Fresh snap coming, and the offense is set. Pressure arrives quickly, but the call stays clear and controlled. He finds daylight and finishes the drive with authority.
